commands: bash -c 'set -e; cd /home/ubuntu/surf-ai-system/infra; echo "=== BUILD ingestion ==="; docker-compose build ingestion-service || docker-compose build ingestion-service; echo "=== BUILD frame-processor ==="; docker-compose build frame-processor || docker-compose build frame-processor; echo "=== BUILD embedding ==="; docker-compose build embedding-service || docker-compose build embedding-service; echo "=== BUILD matching ==="; docker-compose build matching-service || docker-compose build matching-service; echo "=== BUILD clipper ==="; docker-compose build clipper-service || docker-compose build clipper-service; echo "=== BUILD api-gateway ==="; docker-compose build api-gateway || docker-compose build api-gateway; echo "=== DOCKER UP ==="; docker-compose up -d; echo "=== STATUS ==="; sleep 5; docker ps'
